programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band, The Strawberry Jams!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When a simple tune Cherry composes goes viral on the Berryweb, Cherry quickly gets fed up with everyone listening to this song, everywhere, all the time. She goes to comic lengths to get some peace so she can compose the song she's suppose to write for the Queen of Berryvania.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Fortress of War

programme.title: Boone The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When fame-seeking reality show bounty hunter Boone attempts to bring down a drug lord and his empire, he uncovers more than he imagined and learns that justice means more than ratings.

programme.title: Check Point
programme.desc: Port City North Carolina: During a routine camp out, a local vagrant, a former marine discovers plans for an invasion in America. When he tries to notify the local Sheriff about his discovery, the Sheriff dismisses his claims and has him locked up for loitering. The Sheriff's deputy notices odd interactions with other towns folk so he begins to look into the vagrants' claim of a sleeper cell living among the locals within this small town. After evidence of a beheading is exposed, others begin to fear that the insurgents attack on their hometown USA. Questions and tempers begin to rise. Why this little beach community with it's Norman Rockwell way of life? A town where everyone knows one another - or so they thought. When the truth is blind and justice seems lost, It will take an army of five unlikely heroes banding together to infiltrate the insurgents and foil their invasion plans. War is Hell and Hell comes home at the Check Point.

programme.title: Containment
programme.desc: What happens when an epidemic breaks out, but you're kept in the dark? Anything can happen. Slowly the residents realize that they will all die unless they come together.

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney mysteriously disappears, his older brother takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: Beautiful Boy
programme.desc: Bill and Kate's already strained marriage is tested when their college son commits a shocking act of violence.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard reexamines his attitudes while falling for the black wife of the last man he executed.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Love Switch
programme.desc: On their 13th wedding anniversary, James and Michelle wake up to discover they have somehow switched bodies. Unable to switch back, they are forced to understand what the other goes through daily.

programme.title: Island of Grace
programme.desc: For Megan, matters of faith are to be hidden from her friends and coworkers. Her social life and the way she wants to live come first. But when she goes on a business trip with two coworkers- the arrogant office crush Mark, and the office nobody, Chris-her plane crashes, and she's forced to reexamine her life. Stranded on an island in a far corner of the world, Megan begins a journey not just of survival, but discovering herself and what really matters.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: A woman tired of her parents nagging her to find a boyfriend makes a deal with a guy who also doesn't want a relationship to pose as her boyfriend to keep her family off her back until after her birthday party.

programme.title: A Gift Horse
programme.desc: A grieving, young girl works on the local ranch owned by a business tycoon, when a new horse arrives and she takes the opportunity to regain her faith by training it to win.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid Returns
programme.desc: Cisco Kid stops Rosita's marriage to Harris, claiming she's his wife and presenting a borrowed child, Nancy, as proof. After Nancy's father is killed, Cisco protects her from schemers Harris and Conway, who want her inheritance. With clever plotting, Cisco and Pancho outwit the villains to ensure Nancy's safety.

programme.title: Life is Tough, Eh Providence
programme.desc: An eccentric bounty hunter named Providence captures and sets free a criminal in order to collect the same bounty over and over again in different states, until they discover that a local sheriff is up to something crooked.

programme.title: Four Rode Out
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal sets out to bring in a Mexican bandit accused of killing his girlfriend's father, but it turns out that there's more to the story than there first appears to be.

programme.title: Keoma
programme.desc: A half-breed ex-Union gunfighter attempts to protect his plague-ridden hometown from being overridden by his racist half-brothers and a Confederate tyrant.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: The Wolverin is a heavy weight and loner of the vast, coniferous forests, moors and mountains. Resemblying a bear rather than a marten in physique, it can grow up to 1 meter in length and can bring down a young moose with his teeth.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Nuts about Squirrels
programme.desc: Squirrels have conquered tundra, deserts, forests and more, developing ingenious life skills along the way, from stashing nuts to fighting snakes.

programme.title: Magical Fjords
programme.desc: Fjords are one of the most dramatic landscapes on Earth. But for all their beauty and majesty, the surface spectacle is just the tip of the iceberg.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: A robber and loner who loves to hunt at night, the Lynx is Europe's largest wildcat. With the vast mounhtainous forests to call home, where they can hear a mouse from 50 meters away, there is plenty of cover for hunting possibilities.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: The Wolverin is a heavy weight and loner of the vast, coniferous forests, moors and mountains. Resemblying a bear rather than a marten in physique, it can grow up to 1 meter in length and can bring down a young moose with his teeth.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Hoanib
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Desert Elephants
programme.desc: The Namib, one of the most hostile deserts on Earth. Without a firm survival strategy, no living soul will make it here. Yet, surprisingly, some species have adapted their lifestyles to these extreme conditions: chameleons, beetles, snakes and mammals are all at home here. The film follows a family of desert elephants that has also adapted to this habitat.

programme.title: Namibia`s Desert Kingdom
programme.desc: Although the dunes are barren, the dry riverbeds show signs of growth. And out of the heat, vast shapes appear. A herd of desert elephants ambles along the dry riverbed sniffing the ground with their lazy trunks. These remarkable creatures can smell the water underground and know where to find it. An abandoned well attracts a troop of chacma baboons, followed by a small herd of oryx and springbok, and finally a group of jackals. None of them has seen the pride of desert lions lying in wait.

programme.title: mareTV: Venice
programme.desc: Venice has been attracting people as if by magic for centuries. The Italians call her La Serenissima, or the sublime. Perched on wooden posts, she braves the elements and the huge, annual surge of visitors. Vogalonga is the name of a Venetian sports competition for women, in which the participants row their boats standing. This is a tradition that Guilia and Elena also follow. They train hard, as the yearly regatta is soon to begin. Anyone caught driving their water vehicle with more than 7 km/h through the canals of Venice, risks getting a ticket from local policewoman Lorenza Mariutti. The reason: the resulting waves gnaw at the foundations of the grand palaces. Venetians are very attached to their traditional cuisine. The island of Sant' Erasmo is the town's garden. Artichokes, radicchio, onions, everything that grows here is said to taste fantastic, thanks to the salt content of the air and water. Carlo and Claudio Finotello not only grow the vegetables, they even deliver directly to their customers' doors. At sunset, they sail through the lagoon with their boat, brimming with produce, towards San Marco. People waiting at the many bridges, now receive their wares: regional, seasonal, fresh. And without a hint of stress if possible. Like so many other things in Venice. Perhaps because La Serenissima is also known as "The Composed".

programme.title: Dream Islands Of Europe: Capri, Ischia and Procida
programme.desc: Capri and Ischia are world famous. From Naples, it's just a short hop over to the two islands. Perfect destinations, then, for a week's cruise along the Gulf of Naples and the adjoining Amalfi Coast to the south. There, Positano, Amalfi or Salerno as well as a handful of other mostly small harbor towns are extremely worthwhile destinations.

programme.title: The Incredible Five
programme.desc: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah. Few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes. But on occasion, the predatory cats reveal their surprisingly different side. In the Northern Serengeti, a group of male cheetahs emerges and turns all we know about them upside down. Males are usually loners or live in small groups, but here we have five tomcats hunting together as one. It is actually, the largest alliance of the animals ever seen! This film has many stories to tell about the sleek hunters.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We follow the rescue of a baby elephant. Once rescued, it will be transported by plane to the breeding station and raised with love and commitment. In order to satisfy the little pachyderm's urge to move while in the breeding station, there is sometimes an adorable football match between the animals. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We accompany the first steps of a two-year-old elephant who is just starting his release program. We also observe the story of two young elephants in their first night in the wilderness on their own. Captivating film footage allows us to truly learn how elephants behave in the wild. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Leverage - 16 Year Anniversary - The 12 Step Job: The team targets an investment broker who swindled a charity. To discover where the money is hidden, the team tricks the alcoholic financier into entering a rehab facility. There, they learn their mark is not the terrible person he at first appeared… and that rehab may be exactly the place one of them needs to be.

programme.title: The Lost World Remastered
programme.desc: The Lost World Remastered - Absolute Power: The group finds an ancient temple where they discover the crude etching of an atom dating back thousands of years. A ray of light knocks Challenger out, leaving the others frantic to save him. Challenger continues to live an alternate reality in his mind where he has gained the ability to manipulate the law of physics, but this newfound power changes Challenger and endangers his friends!

programme.title: The Lost World Remastered
programme.desc: The Lost World Remastered - Camelot: Marguerite is set to be betrothed to King Gawain. Roxton, Veronica, and Malone come to save her but get their weapons confiscated upon entry. They find out that the king's council, Vordred, is planning to kill him and take his throne. Gawain has them they retrieve the tooth from a T-rex to prove to the king that they're true of heart.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians - 10 Year Anniversary - And the Fangs of Death: Flynn leads his fellow Librarians on a mission to rescue kidnapped Charlene, unwittingly ensnaring them in a subterranean trap filled with ancient Egyptian werewolves, led by nemesis Apep, who are determined to kill the Librarians once and for all.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians - 10 Year Anniversary - And the Reunion of Evil: A routine artifact retrieval is anything but when the artifact grafts itself to Cassandra. Meanwhile a blizzard forces Stone and Cassandra to take shelter at a mysterious hotel that is hosting a demon convention, who want the artifact for themselves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians - 10 Year Anniversary - And the Self-Fulfilling Prophecy: After seeing a vision of her own death at the hands of a supernatural assassin, Baird tries to cheat fate and stop the deadly prophecy from coming true.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Leverage - 16 Year Anniversary - The Mile High Job: The Leverage team attempts to expose a conglomerate's cover-up of their toxic fertilizer which has resulted in the death of a young girl. But the CEO has put all the damning evidence on a plane to the Cayman Islands. The team races to catch the flight but, once airborne, they discover that the CEO's intentions are far more sinister... and that to avenge one life they'll have to save their own.

programme.title: Mary 4 Mayor
programme.desc: What begins for eighteen-yegar-old Mary Parson as a retaliation against her father, the mayor of their small town who abandoned his family after suffering a midlife crisis, turns into a full-scale war as Mary becomes the lone challenger to his re-election. Backed by her graduating high school friends, she discovers what she believes to be the cause of the town's woes that have contributed to its economic decline creating a low morale that isn't uncommon across the country. Running for mayor suddenly takes on a new purpose - along the way she has to determine what and more importantly who is working behind the scenes in blocking her and her teams' path to the promise of their campaign's slogan, “We Can Do Better!” She also has to overcome the very same distractions and human pitfalls that have weakened her father's resolve. In the end, armed with truth, love and faith, she must work to not only save her town but her family as well.

programme.title: Blippi's Holiday Special 2022
programme.desc: Blippi and Meekah follow a holiday treasure map and do some fun winter activities.

programme.title: The Berry Best Treasure
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control—life in Berry Bitty City is impossible! Strawberry rallies their spirits by suggesting a fun way for them to spend the day out of town: a treasure hunt! She describes a game where the girls divide into two teams, and each team creates fun written clues for the other that lead to funny objects the girls must collect.

programme.title: The Berry Scary Fun Adventure
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest! Rallied by a sense of competition and adventure, the girls divide into three groups and set up tents—each convinced they will be the bravest group. They each come up with diverting activities to distract themselves.

programme.title: Foods that Ooze
programme.desc: To win gold at the Ooze-lympics, Avery goes to Chef Dufflet Rosenberg's kitchen to make Molten Chocolate Lava Cake. Lily gets fresh honey at a bee farm. For the final event, Matt challenges them to make extra-oozy, stuffed pizzas.

programme.title: Foods that are Hot
programme.desc: Lily drops in on Chef Lily Pottinger to make a classic spicy Jamaican dish, Jerk Chicken. Avery tests his tolerance for hot peppers at a hot sauce store. Then it's back to the kitchen to see whose fiery wings will bring Matt to tears.

programme.title: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: Blue Angel slowly begins whittling away Playmaker's Life Points using her Trickstar deck. Yusaku manages to fight back and Aoi is forced to use the mysterious card that the Knights of Hanoi gave her.

programme.title: A Storm is Coming
programme.desc: Aoi is left in a coma after he duel with Yusaku. A grieving Akira lures Playmaker into a trap to get the program to heal her. That's when Revolver, Hanoi's leader appears, and challenges Yusaku to a duel with Aoi's fate on the line.

programme.title: Blippi Visits an Orange Farm
programme.desc: Join Blippi as he visits Showcase of Citrus Orange Farm in Clermont, Florida.

programme.title: The Berry Lucky Day
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play—a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park. With Huck on his way, Cherry practices her singing. She believes her ability to hit a perfect high note is the result of a good luck charm—a beautiful crystal — that she keeps in her pocket. Although Strawberry says singing isn't about luck, but about practice and hard work, Cherry isn't convinced.

programme.title: All Dogs Allowed
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away! For some strange reason, they want nothing to do with the dog park! No matter how the girls call them to come in, the pups hesitate and back away, with worried whines. Cherry tries to tempt them by hiding doggie treats around the park, but the pups just run in, snatch the treats and run out. Debate begins about why the pups won't enter the park. Everyone has their own theory. Strawberry wonders if something is scaring them. Blueberry concludes it's Lemon's ice sculpture.

Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: The Rainbow Wave // The Best Pet You Never Met
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Dolphin Dilemma // Ruby and the Beast
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Hat Trick // Dancing on the Ice
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: When the Moon was Missing // Trouble in a Bubble
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.
